basic_details.job_title: ICAR IARI – Research Associate and Senior Research Fellow – 2 Posts
basic_details.short_information: ICAR-Indian Agricultural Research Institute (ICAR IARI) has released a recruitment notification for 2 posts including Research Associate and Senior Research Fellow for candidates with Ph.D, M.Sc. Eligible candidates can apply via email from 08-06-2026 to 10-06-2026 at the official ICAR IARI website.

age_limit.age_details: Research Associate (RA): Max 45 years; Senior Research Fellow (SRF): Max 40 years. Relaxation as per GoI/ICAR rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. degree in Agricultural Physics/Agricultural Engineering/Agricultural Meteorology/Geoinformatics, Remote Sensing & Environmental Sciences OR Master degree in Agricultural Physics/Agricultural Engineering/Agricultural Meteorology/Geoinformatics, Remote Sensing & Environmental Sciences with 4/5 years of Bachelor's degree OR Master's degree in Agronomy with 4 years / 5 years of Bachelor's degree.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ICAR IARI Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
seo_tags: ICAR IARI Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Research Associate and Senior Research Fellow Posts
